name: RENAL ADENOMA

demographics.Frequency: in 7-15-23% of adults (autopsies); most common cortical lesion; increasing with

distribution: usually < 3 cm in size; subcapsular cortical location
discriminating_features: usually < 3 cm in size; subcapsular cortical location
impossible to differentiate from renal cell carcinoma

impossible to differentiate from renal cell carcinoma
